openQuestions.text: Credential requirement and provisioning for Code Mode
openQuestions.note: url-only configs imply no static client key; inferred, needs live round-trip to confirm
undocumented in all fetched sources; open install-guide caveat

resolvedQuestions.answer: Design MCP exposes search_screens (query, platform ios|web, limit default 5 ~15 max, deep mode); returns {screens:[{index,id,app_name,mobbin_url,image_url,platform}],failed:[]} + inline image blocks. Docs MCP (search_mobbin_docs, query_docs_filesystem_mobbin_docs, submit_feedback) is a SEPARATE server.
Remote Streamable HTTP at https://api.mobbin.com/mcp; no local process; url-only client config.
One official skill mobbin-search driving search_screens; 6-step workflow (plan/announce/call/respond-or-board/build-board/more).

Packet = remote streamable-http, Code Mode only, read-only (mutatesWorkspace:false), tool search_screens, sk-design pairing; UTCP manual name 'mobbin', exposed tool mobbin_search_screens. Exact .utcp_config.json schema deferred to phase 003.
resolvedQuestions.source: derived from server.json + SKILL.md + hub pattern

keyFindings.text: Mobbin design MCP is remote Streamable HTTP at https://api.mobbin.com/mcp; no local process; mutatesWorkspace:false holds.
mobbin-mcp-server repo is metadata-only (README, mcp.json, server.json, rules/, .cursor-plugin/).
TWO distinct Mobbin MCPs: api.mobbin.com/mcp (design refs, com.mobbin/mobbin) vs docs.mobbin.com/mcp (Mintlify docs, 'Mobbin Docs'). Do NOT conflate.
Design MCP tool = search_screens (query/platform/limit/deep) returns inline image content blocks + metadata.
All documented client configs are url-only; no static API key/headers/OAuth field present.
MCP returns images inline; mobbin-search visually inspects them; natural sk-design pairing surface.
Free-vs-Pro plan gating is undocumented in all fetched sources.
docs.mobbin.com/mcp is a clean read-only docs-search surface (secondary candidate, out of primary mcp-mobbin scope).
